query:
SELECT
  DATE(paid_at) AS paid_date,
  SUM(CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS sum_amount,
  SUM(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.principal_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS sum_principal,
  SUM(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.interest_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS sum_interest,
  SUM(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.fee_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS sum_fee,
  SUM(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.penalty_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS sum_penalty,
  SUM(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.unlock_fee_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS sum_unlock_fee,
  SUM(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.overpaid_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS sum_overpaid,
  SUM(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.bad_debt_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS sum_bad_debt,
  SUM(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.discount_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS sum_discount,
  SUM(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.total_paid_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS sum_total_paid,
  SUM(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.close_installment_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS sum_close
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
  AND DATE(paid_at) BETWEEN '2026-04-01' AND '2026-04-05'
GROUP BY DATE(paid_at)
ORDER BY paid_date ASC;
